title: Ranking every starter in the men's Final Four
content: Arizona, Michigan, UConn and Illinois each have a representative in the top five -- but one semifinalist has two.

title: Tiger stepping away from golf to seek treatment
content: In a statement four days after his arrest in Florida, Tiger Woods said Tuesday he is "committed to taking the time needed to return to a healthier, stronger, and more focused place, both personally and professionally."

title: Out like a lion: Luka ends March with 600 points
content: Luka Doncic had his third straight 40-point game, lifting his March scoring total to 600 points and adding to a strong month for the Lakers, who finished with a 15-2 record.

title: Portugal outclasses U.S. amid Pulisic goal drought
content: The United States dropped its second match in a row Tuesday, losing to Portugal in a friendly at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta to conclude its March international window.

title: Goodell backs Rooney Rule amid litigation threat
content: NFL commissioner Roger Goodell says he believes the Rooney Rule is "consistent" with hiring laws after recently being threatened by Florida's attorney general with potential civil litigation if the rule was not eliminated.

title: Ump Bucknor in spotlight again after missed call
content: Umpire C.B. Bucknor, who had the poorest results among umpires in MLB's new ABS system last weekend, had another call overturned at first base during Tuesday's Brewers-Rays game.

title: Italy miss out on 3rd straight WC in shootout loss
content: Italy has missed out on a third consecutive World Cup after losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina in a penalty shootout on Tuesday in Zenica.

title: Hurley: I thought ref was looking to chest-bump
content: UConn coach Dan Hurley downplayed his bizarre interaction with an official at the end of Sunday's NCAA tournament victory against Duke, saying he thought the referee was looking to "chest-bump me to celebrate."

title: With lockout possible, MLBPA war chest at $415M
content: MLB players have accumulated $415 million in U.S. Treasury securities, cash and other investments as they prepare for the possibility of an extended lockout when the CBA expires Dec. 1.

title: 📉 2026 Pain Index: Where does Duke's loss rank?
content: Some losses are understandable in the NCAA tournament. Others will haunt us forever (see: Duke). We rank them all.

title: Inside Eagles' 2025 friction as Jalen Hurts stands at crossroads
content: ESPN pulls back the curtain on what's ailing a star-studded Eagles offense, one in which their QB must evolve.

content: Who is the sport's most dominant pitcher right now? We rank the elite, with the help of MLB scouts and execs.

content: Annual NFL owners meeting wrapped up Tuesday, and 30 of our reporters shared all the buzz from Phoenix.

content: LeBron James wasn't letting a younger Bronny James have a shot at a win, and he broke a backboard in the process.

title: Boxing divisional rankings: Moses Itauma crashes into heavyweight top 5
content: Moses Itauma disposed of Jermaine Franklin Jr. to move up at heavyweight. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid eye Liverpool's Ekitike over Haaland
content: Liverpool forward Hugo Ekitike has emerged as an attractive option for Real Madrid. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Why new rules have Max Verstappen on the brink of walking away from F1
content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

title: Israeli Strike In Beirut Kills Top Hezbollah Commander: Sources
content: An Israeli strike in the Jnah area of Beirut early on Wednesday killed Hezbollah's top commander for Iraq military affairs, Yousef Hashem, a Lebanese security source and...

title: After SIR, A Move To Remove Dead Voters From Aadhaar Database
content: UIDAI has urged the EC to share data on dead voters, but no decision has been taken yet on their request, sources said.

title: Opinion: Opinion | 'Go Get Your Oil': Is Trump About To Cut And Run On His Own War?
content: Trump's decision to end the war without achieving any of his previously stated objectives will be viewed by many as a cut-and-run move. Some will interpret this as an admission of defeat.

title: LIC Agent Attacked With Acid Outside Home In Andhra Pradesh
content: A shocking acid attack on an Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) agent in Andhra Pradesh's Visakhapatnam was caught on CCTV, with an unidentified man targeting the victim outside his home in Gajuwaka on Tuesday night.

title: Video: Toddler Among 4 Injured As Bus Rams Passengers In Karnataka
content: In a shocking incident, a speeding transport bus ploughed into passengers waiting at a bus stand in Karnataka's Haveri on Wednesday morning, leaving a two-year-old child and three others injured.

title: 2,000 Ships, 20,000 Sailors, SOS Barrage: Hormuz Blockade's Human Cost
content: One of the members of the support team said about 50 per cent of the emails they received from seafarers are about pay

title: Passengers Stranded In Moving Traffic After Robotaxi Outage In China's Wuhan
content: A preliminary investigation indicates more than 100 robotaxis came to a halt because of a "system malfunction".

title: Rs 67 Crore For Bungalow? Hemant Soren At Centre Of "Sheesh Mahal" Row
content: Political analysts say that this dispute is not merely about the construction of a building, it is also intertwined with political messaging and public sentiment.

title: Planning To Buy An EV In Karnataka? You May Soon Have To Spend More
content: The bill proposes separate lifetime tax slabs for EVs such as private cars, jeeps, omnibuses, and cabs.

title: Kidnapped Journalist Had Been Warned Of Threats, US, Iraq Officials Say
content: Shelly Renee Kittleson had sought to enter Iraq from Syria on March 9 but was turned back because she did not have a press work permit.

content: Mughrabi GAZA/CAIRO, April 1 (Reuters)  They've never known their parents, and they've never known Gaza, born prematurely two years ago and evacuated to

title: Behind Techie Couple's Suicide In Bengaluru, Job Loss Due To AI
content: Reddy had been struggling to secure stable employment for nearly a year after losing his job in the US, the investigation has found.

title: Premium Petrol Price Rises To Rs 160 Per Litre, Jet Fuel Hiked By 8.5%
content: US Israel Iran War: Premium Petrol, XP100, Price Hiked By Rs 11 per litre, Jet Fuel Crosses Rs 2 Lakh Per Kilolitre

title: Tigress Hit By Train Near UP's Dudhwa National Park, Dies
content: A tigress was killed after being hit by a train near the Bhikhampur halt in Dudhwa National Park's buffer zone, forest officials said on Wednesday.

title: Congress "Dangerous", Vote For Viksit Assam: PM's Big Pitch Ahead Of Polls
content: Addressing the rally at Gogamukh in Assam's Dhemaji, PM Modi criticised the Congress for trying to bring the anti-Communal Violence bill 2014.

title: School Teacher Dies After SUV Collides With Scooter In Rajasthan's Jhunjhunu
content: Pilani Station House Officer Chandrabhan said Damyanti Chanwaria (45), a teacher posted at a government upper primary school, died in the accident.

title: Oil Disruptions Will Double This Month, Affect Europe Too: Energy Agency Head
content: The Iran war has created the biggest oil disruption in history, the IEA said last month after it agreed to release a record volume from strategic stockpiles to make up for shortages and a spike in prices.

title: Houthis Claim 'Third Joint Missile Operation' Targeting Israel
content: The Yemeni Armed Forces have announced the execution of their "third joint operation" in coordination with allied groups in Iran and Lebanon, targeting "sensitive sites" in "south of occupied Palestine."

title: 'We'll find him another job': Rahul meets 'Yamaraj', hails UDF's health scheme
content: Rahul Gandhi encountered a man dressed as Yamaraj during his Kerala campaign, humorously suggesting the UDF's proposed Rs 25 lakh health insurance scheme would render the God of Death jobless. This initiative aims to alleviate financial burdens from medical crises, ensuring healthcare as a right for all Keralites.

title: Oracle layoffs: Company sets this severance condition for laid-off employees
content: Oracle has started its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally. Employees must sign termination documents via DocuSign to receive severance, which appears less generous than competitors.  These cuts, potentially reaching 30,000, aim to fund a massive AI data center expansion, a move that has placed the company under significant financial strain.

title: 'Dhurandhar2' BO Day 14: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 1000 crore net milestone
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has shattered records, officially crossing the Rs. 900 crore India net milestone. In just two weeks, the Aditya Dhar directorial has collected a staggering Rs.903.22 crore domestic net, surpassing the lifetime totals of almost every Indian blockbuster to date. Led by Ranveer Singh's career-defining performance as Hamza, the film has shown incredible resilience against the IPL 2026 matches, maintaining massive footfalls across theatres nationwide. With a current India gross of Rs. 1,081.31 crore and a global haul nearing Rs. 1,400 crore, the spy epic featuring Sanjay Dutt and Arjun Rampal is now chasing the historic Rs. 1,000 crore India net club.

title: Pakistan's Akmal makes bold claim on Sooryavanshi’s India future
content: Teenage batter Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is making headlines with explosive IPL performances, including a 35-ball century and a 15-ball fifty. Kamran Akmal believes he is ready for international cricket, praising his maturity and fearless approach. Backed by strong support, Sooryavanshi’s rapid rise has raised expectations, with Akmal saying bowlers may struggle against him in the future.

title: Oracle layoffs: Employees in India, US, & other regions receive email at 6am
content: Oracle has initiated widespread global layoffs, impacting employees in the US, India, and other regions without prior notice.  Termination emails, sent directly from leadership, cited organizational changes as the reason, with affected teams seeing significant reductions.  This move is reportedly to fund Oracle's ambitious, debt-financed AI infrastructure expansion, potentially impacting thousands of jobs.

title: Watch: Woman sets SUV, two-wheelers ablaze using 'petrol bombs' near Orissa high court
content: A woman has been detained after setting fire to petrol bottles near the Orissa High Court boundary wall in Cuttack. The blaze damaged an SUV and three other vehicles parked nearby. Authorities are investigating her motive and how she obtained the petrol.

title: Fighting from hotels: Iran's missile, drone strikes force US military out of its own bases
content: Iranian attacks have severely damaged US military bases across the Middle East. American troops are now operating from temporary locations, impacting warfighting capabilities. This shift forces the Pentagon to adapt its strategy. The conflict has also affected civilian areas and critical shipping routes. The US military continues its campaign despite these challenges.

title: Deloitte to hire 50,000 in India, bets big on AI and upskilling
content: Deloitte plans to hire 50,000 professionals in India, emphasizing AI integration and upskilling to handle complex roles. The company views AI as a tool for efficiency, not workforce reduction.  Nitin Kini highlighted data security and cost as key concerns for Indian PSUs adopting AI, advocating for simultaneous advancement in AI production and cybersecurity.

title: Arjun, son of Sachin, makes honest admission: 'I don't have cricketer friends'
content: Arjun Tendulkar, now with Lucknow Super Giants, shared insights into his simple personal life, saying he spends time with his dogs and has few cricketer friends. Unfazed by trolling, he said, "No, I'm not" scared of criticism. After limited chances at Mumbai Indians, he faces fresh competition but hopes to prove himself and step out of his father’s shadow.

title: 'Front for Corruption': Rajnath Singh accuses LDF, UDF of 'deceiving' Kerala for decades
content: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh launched a strong attack on Kerala's LDF and UDF, accusing both of deceiving the state's people for decades with similar politics and governance. He alleged corruption and poor performance, stating voters are seeking a credible alternative as the BJP-led NDA intensifies its campaign for the upcoming Assembly elections.

title: Quote of the day by Julia Roberts
content: Hollywood icon Julia Roberts, celebrated for her down-to-earth charm, shares a poignant quote: "If you love someone, you say it, right then, out loud. Otherwise, the moment just passes you by.

title: Power shift? Iran military takes control of state functions, sidelines prez - report
content: Iran's IRGC has reportedly seized control of key state functions, blocking presidential appointments and decisions, pushing President Pezeshkian into a political deadlock. The IRGC chief commander intervened to reject proposed intelligence minister candidates, asserting the military's direct oversight of critical positions amid unclear Supreme Leader status.

title: 'Double-ghulami govt': Priyanka calls PM 'slave' of US, Assam CM that of Modi
content: Priyanka Gandhi accused the BJP of running a "government of double-slavery," alleging Prime Minister Modi is beholden to America and Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma is Modi's subordinate. She promised Congress welfare schemes, including financial aid for women and enhanced healthcare, while PM Modi countered by calling Congress "anti-development" and the "root cause" of corruption.

title: Prince Harry’s flirty texts to reporter surface in court during privacy trial
content: Prince Harry's legal battle against tabloids took an unexpected turn with decade-old text messages revealing a friendly rapport with a reporter. The exchanges, from 2011-2012, show a younger Harry engaging in flirtatious banter, contradicting his current testimony of limited contact and immediate disengagement upon realizing her profession. This revelation complicates his narrative of being solely a victim of the press.

title: From dead end to staging ground: How Chandrayaan-1 triggered US dash to Moon
content: Written Off As Dry & Dead After Apollo, Moon Regained Scientific & Strategic Relevance After Isro’s 2008 Mission Detected Water Molecules, Reshaping Global Space Policy, Allowing For Artemis

title: US to exit Nato? Trump slams alliance as 'paper tiger' as bloc dithers on joining Iran war
content: President Trump is strongly considering withdrawing the US from Nato, labeling the alliance a 'paper tiger' due to European allies' refusal to support US actions in the Iran conflict. He cited a lack of reciprocity and criticized the UK's stance. The US may re-examine its Nato role, with potential structural changes like a 'pay-to-play' model being discussed.

title: 'Not our war': UK PM snubs Trump, to host multi-nation meeting on reopening Hormuz
content: Prime Minister Keir Starmer affirmed Britain will not join the Middle East conflict, deeming it "not our war" and not in the UK's national interest. He announced a meeting of 35 countries to discuss reopening the Strait of Hormuz and ensuring maritime security, aiming to mitigate economic fallout and rising energy costs.

title: 'Rs 5000 lagakar dekho': Shami on Goenka's viral boundary talks with KL Rahul, Pant
content: LSG owner Sanjiv Goenka's interactions with captains after defeats have sparked debate. However, pacer Mohammed Shami defended Goenka, stating he is passionate about cricket and his high expectations are justified due to his significant investment in the team. Shami emphasized Goenka's logical communication and positive player interactions.

title: OTP can't secure payments: RBI rolls out stricter digital payment rules
content: India's digital payments are getting a security boost from April 1 with stricter RBI authentication rules, requiring two-factor verification for all transactions to combat rising fraud.  Beyond digital payments, changes affect credit cards, FASTags, RuPay cards, PAN applications, and banking services, alongside a new income tax framework, aiming for a safer financial ecosystem.

title: ‘Ponting once again proved right’: Ashwin on Punjab Kings’ bold call
content: Ravichandran Ashwin lauded Ricky Ponting's team selection after Punjab Kings secured a narrow IPL 2026 victory against Gujarat Titans. Ashwin initially questioned the inclusion of Xavier Bartlett but was proven wrong by the player's crucial batting cameo. Cooper Connolly's debut knock anchored the chase, showcasing his composure under pressure.

title: Nifty50 tops 22,650, Sensex surges 1,187 points - top reasons for rally
content: Stock market today: Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex rallied sharply on Wednesday on hopes of an end to the US-Iran war; Nifty crossed 22,900 while Sensex surged nearly 2,000 points.

title: Pushed out by Jyoti Basu, eclipsed by Mamata, crushed by BJP: Congress' 50-year exile in Bengal
content: Once a dominant force, West Bengal's Congress party has seen its influence dwindle significantly over five decades. From landslide victories to being overshadowed by communist rule and then Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool Congress, the party now struggles for relevance.

title: From income tax to FASTag fee: 10 things that will change your finances from April 1
content: Some of the changes affect credit card users, FASTag subscribers, RuPay debit cardholders. Here are some of the key revisions scheduled for implementation from the start of the new financial year.

title: Make in India boost: Armed with sensors, torpedoes, rockets, submarine hunter ‘Malwan’ joins Navy
content: The Indian Navy has received 'Malwan', its second Anti-Submarine Warfare Shallow Water Craft, built by Cochin Shipyard Limited. This vessel, with over 80% indigenous content, is designed for coastal defense and underwater warfare, strengthening India's maritime capabilities. The delivery aligns with the nation's push for indigenous defense manufacturing.

title: 'Hat-trick of defeat for Congress certain': PM Modi takes 'rajkumar' dig at Rahul Gandhi in Assam
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi launched a strong attack on Congress in Assam, dubbing Rahul Gandhi a "Rajkumar" and predicting electoral defeats. He expressed confidence in the BJP-led NDA securing a "hattrick" in the state, highlighting development under Sarbananda Sonowal and Himanta Biswa Sarma. PM Modi also promised a Uniform Civil Code and positioned Assam as a future tech hub.

title: Anti-drone laser defence system in Washington to protect Hegseth, Rubio: How it works
content: A new direct energy anti-drone system, including lasers, has been installed near Palm Beach International Airport to protect high-profile individuals and locations. This deployment addresses rising drone threats in modern warfare, adding a mobile defense layer to secure sensitive airspace and civilian aviation.

title: Fortnite v40.10 update release time for all regions
content: Fortnite's v40.10 update is scheduled for April 1, 2026, bringing new cosmetics, balance changes, and gameplay adjustments. Servers will go down for approximately two hours starting at 4 AM ET, with maintenance expected to conclude around 6 AM ET. Players can anticipate new content, potentially including April Fools' themed skins like Tung Tung Tung Sahur.

title: Government tightens oversight of GLP-1 drugs, flags risks amid rising demand; key details
content: The Centre has issued a detailed advisory on GLP-1 receptor agonist drugs, emphasizing their use for type 2 diabetes and obesity must be strictly under medical supervision. Authorities are increasing regulatory surveillance and warning of strict action against violations in their sale or prescription.

title: 'I don't want to do a disservice': Ian Bishop on preparation in commentary
content: As Harbhajan Singh, Aakash Chopra and Navjot Singh Sidhu face social media criticism over their IPL commentary, Ian Bishop stands out for his meticulous research-driven approach. The former West Indies pacer credits ground journalists for fueling his storytelling, balances energy with silence, and draws on Richie Benaud’s wisdom to handle criticism with perspective.

title: Congress slams Centre over bill proposing to increase Lok Sabha seats
content: Congress has opposed a bill to increase Lok Sabha seats by 50%, arguing it disadvantages southern, northeastern, and western states. The party claims the proposal, which would significantly boost representation for northern states, is deceptive and could be a 'weapon of mass diversion' from government failures.

title: Why Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei hasn’t appeared in public? Russian envoy explains
content: Mojtaba Khamenei remains in Iran but is not appearing publicly. Russia's ambassador to Tehran Alexey Dedov confirmed this amid widespread speculation. Rumors circulated about his health and possible medical treatment abroad. Khamenei took office after his father's death in February. Russia and Iran maintain strong diplomatic ties.

title: 'Bas ho gaya': Rishabh Pant ends Nitish Rana–Digvesh Rathi feud
content: Rishabh Pant played peacemaker between Nitish Rana and Digvesh Rathi, resolving their on-field spat during the Delhi Premier League. The LSG captain's intervention helped the two cricketers patch things up ahead of the IPL 2026 clash between Lucknow Super Giants and Delhi Capitals. Both teams are looking to improve after missing the playoffs in the previous season.

title: Heavyweight madness: Which big fella would win a 16-man tournament?
content: the men's and women's basketball tournaments haven't stopped us from creating our own hypothetical tournaments for the past few years . the big fellas will take center stage in this year's bracket . former uFC and PFL heavyweight champ Alex Pereira will move up to MMA's premier weight class on may 14 .

title: Week 8 Top 25 and how to watch
content: a big shakeup in this week's top ten . Nebraska, Alabama, Arkansas, Florida, Tennessee and UCLA all shuffling places . the Crimson Tide received a first-place vote in advance of their series against the team that received the most votes, Texas .

title: UConn odds-on title favorite, 1-seeds all that remain in women's tournament
content: the women's college basketball tournament will be with -160 odds . it will be its longest since the calendar flipped to 2026 . in January, Geno Auriemma's squad was -190 to win the title . UCLA has fallen to the bottom of the odds board at +600 .

title: UFL Power Rankings: Which Week 1 winner tops the list, plus each team's MVP
content: a biweekly look at how all eight teams stack up against each other . we've scrapped the MVP acronym this week and dubbed a player from each franchise as the MIPITU: Most important player in the universe .

title: 2026 rankings: Profiling the top 35 QBs
content: the 2024 NFL MVP has finished in the top 10 in passing TDs six seasons in a row and remains a major threat with his legs . despite seeing less passing volume the past two seasons (14th or lower in pass attempts both years), he has finished second among quarterbacks in fantasy points . his 21.4 fantasy points per game in 2025 was actually his lowest since 2019 .

title: Top newcomers for Notre Dame and every Big Ten team; what coaches, GMs are saying
content: coach Curt Cignetti says he ripped Michigan State transfer Nick Marsh for wearing gold cleats to practice . no conference in 2025 better felt how quality newcomers can reshape rosters like the Big Ten .

title: NHL playoff watch: How many California teams will make the playoffs?
content: the Anaheim Ducks are on top of the Pacific Division with 87 points and 24 regulation wins (RW) through 74 games . the Los Angeles Kings and San Jose Sharks are not far behind the Nashville Predators for the second wild-card spot . they will host the St. Louis Blues and the Sharks .

title: Chris Pronger on Auston Matthews hit, future of NHL Player Safety
content: Chris Pronger has a unique perspective on NHL player safety . he's like an inmate that eventually became a warden at the prison . Pronger was suspended for slashing, high sticking, hitting to the head, kicking and perhaps most infamously stepping on Ryan Kesler with his skate .

title: How a surprise call led to 'dream' St. Brown homecoming in Germany
content: amon-Ra St. Brown received a text from a team communications staffer trying to orchestrate a facetime call with his mother . his mother, Miriam, broke the news to her youngest son that the Lions would be playing a 2026 regular-season game in her home country . the full schedule of the game will be revealed later this spring .

title: MMA divisional rankings: Grasso, Pyfer elevate their standing in knockout performances
content: the main event pitted two-time former middleweight champion Israel Adesanya against rising Joe Pyfer . he scored a second-round knockout for his fourth straight victory . former women's flyweight champion Alexa Grasso finished fellow top-10 fighter Maycee Barber in the first round .

title: Draymond Green reflects on his future amid uncertainty in Golden State
content: the Golden State Warriors were two games above .500 but stumbling in the wrong direction . they had lost three of five coming out of the All-Star break . but they built a 17-point first-half lead .

title: One thing to know about each World Cup team
content: 'FC TV' crew debate which host nation will go the furthest in the 2026 world cup? we know all 48 teams that will be involved in next summer's tournament in the united states, Mexico and Canada . the final six countries were decided via the playoffs this week .

title: Player ratings: Pulisic 3/10 in USMNT's disappointing loss to Portugal
content: the united states lost 2-0 to Portugal in a friendly at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium . the visitors eventually took the lead in the 37th minute when Francisco Trinco slotted a shot past goalkeeper Matt Freese . Mauricio Pochettino and his roster will now begin final prepa .

title: Blast outside Punjab BJP office; police cordon off area
content: The TOI News Desk comprises a dedicated and tireless team of journalists who operate around the clock to deliver the most current and comprehensive news and updates to the readers of The Times of India worldwide. With an unwavering commitment to excellence in journalism, our team is at the forefront of gathering, verifying, and presenting breaking news, in-depth analysis, and insightful reports on a wide range of topics. The TOI News Desk is your trusted source for staying informed and connected to the ever-evolving global landscape, ensuring that our readers are equipped with the latest developments that matter most." Read More

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Parliament passes Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (Amendment) Bill, 2026
content: Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code contributed to health of Indian banking sector, helped recover assets, says FM Sitharaman in Rajya Sabha; Lok Sabha discusses The Jan Vishwas (Amendment of Provisions) Bill, 2026.

title: KIA gets ACI’s Level 5 customer experience accreditation
content: BIAL says KIA’s achievement follows a rigorous review and validation process, reflecting strong alignment with global standards and industry best practices

title: ‘Patriot’ postponed: Mammootty-Mohanlal movie gets new release date
content: The highly anticipated Malayalam film ‘Patriot’, featuring the legendary duo Mohanlal and Mammootty, has pushed its release date thanks to some “unforeseen circumstances,”

title: KSRTC’s training programmes earn World HRD Congress Award
content: The award recognises KSRTC’s extensive and structured training initiatives implemented across its five training centres

title: Enriching life will enrich language, says Siddanagouda Patil
content: Activist and journalist Siddanagouda Patil has said that if the life of people speaking a language is enriched, it will automatically enrich that language

title: Census 2027: How to do self-enumeration - a step-by-step guide
content: Census 2027 will be completely digital, with enumerators recording data from house visits on mobile applications.

title: How an ex-IPS officer, transferred by Election Commission for praising Jayalalithaa, later became AIADMK MLA
content: Nearly 20 months after R. Natraj joined the AIADMK, he was taken aback when Jayalalithaa expelled him from the party and asked the cadre not to have any relations with him.

title: Watch: What’s at stake in the Tamil Nadu elections 2026?
content: Tamil Nadu’s 2026 Assembly election is shaping up to be more than a familiar DMK vs AIADMK contest. But new entrants are complicating the picture. Here’s all you need to know.

title: Assembly Election LIVE: Will implement Uniform Civil Code, safeguard tribals to protect Assam’s identity, says PM Modi
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the Congress, if it comes to power in Assam, will bring in a law to protect infiltrators, which the BJP and its allies will not allow

title: Kerala HC upholds plea challenging Suresh Gopi’s 2024 Thrissur election as maintainable
content: Petition filed by a Thrissur native alleges Suresh Gopi and his election agent indulged in ‘corrupt’ practices, as mentioned in Representation of People’s Act, to solicit votes

title: Delhi HC orders Paramvah Studios to pay ₹25 lakh for unauthorised use of songs in Rakshit Shetty's ‘Bachelor Party’
content: Amount includes ₹20 lakh towards licence fee for songs “Nyaya Ellide” and “Omme Ninnanu”, which has already been deposited during the proceedings, and an additional ₹5 lakh imposed as exemplary costs for non-compliance with an earlier court order.

title: Supreme Court stays disproportionate assets proceedings against Tamil Nadu Minister Duraimurugan
content: The Supreme Court also issued a notice to the Tamil Nadu government on the appeal filed by Mr. Duraimurugan against an order of the Madras High Court

title: LPG and fuel crisis highlights: Jet fuel prices more than doubled to ₹2.07 lakh/kl; commercial LPG up ₹195.50
content: This is the first time ever that aviation turbine fuel prices have crossed the ₹2 lakh per kilolitre mark; domestic cooking gas LPG rates, which were last hiked by ₹60 per 14.2 kg cylinder on March 7, remain unchanged

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan says Centre’s anti-minority FCRA (amendment) Bill exposes BJP’s 'cake and flower diplomacy' towards Church leaders in Kerala
content: He says the Bill is in line with the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh’s core ideology and the foundational texts of the RSS, including Vicharadhara by M.S. Golwalkar, view Christians, Muslims and communists as internal enemies and fifth columnists who deserve elimination

title: ‘Kathanar’ trailer: Jayasurya’s anticipated fantasy thriller promises stunning visuals
content: Directed by Rojin Thomas and produced by Gokulam Gopalan, the film promises breathtaking visuals and a captivating story based on the 9th-century deacon Kadamattathu Kathanar

title: Luthra brothers get bail in Goa nightclub fire case, to remain in jail
content: The owners of the nightclub will remain in prison for forgery case as their pre bail request gets rejected

title: “Objection” to Martyrs Park site reopens Oting killing wounds in Nagaland
content: Konyak Union resents the alleged objection by Assam Rifles to the location identified for the memorial.

title: Pensioners generated 1.9 crore digital life certificates in 2025-26: Govt
content: The government has launched face authentication technique which requires only a smartphone for generation of DLCs

title: T.N. CM Stalin dares Edappadi Palaniswami to spell out his stance on CAA now
content: Accusing the former Chief Minister of betraying the minorities and Sri Lankan Tamils by supporting the Act brought in by the BJP to save his position, Mr. Stalin alleged that the legislation was passed with the support of the AIADMK and PMK leader Anbumani Ramadoss in the Rajya Sabha

title: Rajya Sabha passes CAPF Bill, Opposition walks out
content: The CAPF Bill seeks to create a unified legal framewaork governing personnel across different CAPF forces, replacing the current patchwork of separate service rule regimes for the five Central Armed Police Forces

title: ORS labelling row: Hyderabad paediatrician Sivaranjani Santosh refuses to back down amid pressure
content: As pharma companies serve a legal notice against her, Dr. Santosh said her campaign was driven solely by concern for children’s health and warned that silencing such voices would discourage others from speaking out on public health issues

title: 1984 anti-Sikh riots crusader H.S. Phoolka joins BJP
content: In 2019, K.S. Phoolka was awarded the Padma Shri in recognition of his decades-long legal battle to secure justice for the victims of the 1984 riots

title: SC says voting rights of excluded West Bengal voters cannot be ‘washed away forever’
content: Court asks EC tribunals to ensure fair adjudication of electoral roll exclusions during Special Intensive Revision

title: Commercial LPG prices rise 10%; government caps ATF hike on domestic flights at 25%
content: The government stated that OMCs’ under-recovery from cylinders presently stand at ₹380 for every cylinder

title: Census 2027: Mandya residents urged to take part in self-enumeration
content: Citizens can log in to the official website, and complete the process by answering 33 questions related to household listing and housing census

title: Delhi mayor's office receives bomb threat via e-mail; probe underway
content: Security tightened around the mayor’s office after alleged bomb threats by the Khalistan National Army.

title: CPI(M) slams Suresh Gopi’s MP tenure in Thrissur as ‘total failure’
content: Party alleges Suresh Gopi has done ‘nothing’ for the people of Thrissur constituency despite making ‘grand promises’ during election campaign

title: Itanagar eateries told to drop meat references from names
content: Itanagar Municipal Corporation order directs hotels and restaurants to remove pork, beef, chicken or mutton references from signboards

title: Rabies confirmed after mass dog bite incident in Assam town
content: A team from a Mission Rabies centre traced the infection to a domesticated dog buried by its owner in Lanka, about 190 km from Guwahati

title: Kerala elections: Fresh row in Guruvayur as BJP candidate B. Gopalakrishnan faces backlash over flex board on past MLAs
content: Move viewed as reinforcing B. Gopalakrishnan’s controversial ‘Hindu MLA’ remark as the display is widely seen as an attempt to foreground community background of past representatives

title: Passage of ‘Amaravati Bill’ in Lok Sabha a historic moment: Lokesh
content: He stated that the Andhra Pradesh (AP) Legislative Assembly previously passed a unanimous resolution designating Amaravati as the Capital and the approval of the above Bill made the five crore people of AP extremely happy

title: CoinDCX launches ₹100 crore cybersecurity network after impersonation-linked controversy
content: CoinDCX co-founders Sumit Gupta and Neeraj Khandelwal spoke about their arrests and announced the launch of the ₹100 crore Digital Suraksha Network to support independent research, new standards, and educational tools for both state cybercrime cells and everyday Indian users

title: Lok Sabha passes bill to recognise Amaravati as Andhra capital
content: The bill, which will scuttle any future bid to alter the decision to make Amaravati the sole and permanent capital, was passed in the Lok Sabha by a voice vote

title: With NavIC setback, India unable to use satellite system for security purposes: experts
content: A major setback occurred after the last atomic clock on board the Indian Regional Navigational Satellite System-1F (IRNSS-1F) stopped functioning on March 10, leaving only three satellites of the NavIC constellation in function; armed forces of countries use the navigation satellite system for logistics, mapping and operational planning, and relying on a foreign navigation satellite system could pose security issues, especially during wars

title: Mysuru City Corporation introduces motor vehicle cess, increases property tax by 3%
content: The levy of Motor Vehicle Cess comes a year after the introduction of garbage collection cess and collection solid waste management fee from property owners with effect from April 2025

title: Israeli Defence firm supplies first batch of light machine guns to India
content: The delivery was carried out by PLR Systems, a joint venture between IWI and Adani Group, the first private company in India to manufacture small arms and ammunition

title: Residents’ association moves Madras High Court against traffic problem in MRC Nagar
content: Says, parking of motor vehicles on both sides of the narrow roads all day long prevents the free movement of even ambulances

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Pinarayi Vijayan slams ‘Congress-BJP nexus’ over G. Sudhakaran’s rebel bid in Ambalappuzha
content: Kerala CM casts G. Sudhakaran’s candidature as UDF-backed Independent in Ambalappuzha as ‘a stark example of the convergence of Congress and BJP’s transactional political lines’

title: Disproportionate assets case against A. Raja: Madras High Court seeks CBI’s response
content: Justice A.D. Jagadish Chandira orders notice to the agency on the former Union Minister’s plea to submit certain documents before the special court for MP/MLA cases in Chennai

title: How a desi attorney is fighting Trump's order on birthright citizenship
content: attorney Smita Ghosh has emerged as a central intellectual architect behind the defense of the Fourteenth Amendment to the US Constitution . she is expected to play a significant role in how the justices approach a case that could redefine the meaning of US citizenship . her work is rooted in early American legal tradition .

title: How one undisclosed campaign vehicle led to an election being set aside in Tamil Nadu
content: In 1991, while AIADMK candidate R. Puthunainar Athithan was celebrating his victory in the Chernamahadevi constituency, his rival P.H. Pandian filed an election petition in the Madras High Court, accusing Athithan of having indulged in corrupt practices under the Representation of the People Act

title: World Bank-funded health scheme in Kerala might need more scrutiny
content: The ₹3,464-crore World Bank- assisted  Kerala Health System Improvement Programme commits the State to a 25-year-loan with a five-year grace period. Public health experts have pointed out the red flags when a State, whose total debt has surged by 80% in the last five years, takes on a 25-year World Bank loan and the pressure of repayment

title: PM Modi visits tea garden in poll-bound Assam, interacts with women workers
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is on a day-long visit to the State to address two campaign rallies for BJP candidates

title: ‘BJP loot diwas’: Congress slams price hike of essential commodities
content: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge said while the common citizens are hoping for relief, the BJP leadership remains entirely focused on "looting the public and plundering the nation amidst this crisis"

title: Government releases 33 FAQs for first phase of Census
content: The portal has a list of Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) to make it easy for the public to answer questions posed during the 16th Census of the country

title: JNU failing on social justice, SC/ST enrolment down 25%: Digvijaya Singh in Rajya Sabha
content: Mr. Singh also flagged 89 pending faculty promotion cases at JNU, of which 62 had exceeded the stipulated processing period, saying the delays were affecting career progression and PhD supervision capacity.

title: West Bengal Assembly election: Candidates scrub utensils, fry fritters to seek votes
content: One candidate washed utensils in a village home, while another carried buckets of water for an elderly woman, and the third shaved a voter at a roadside saloon

title: U.S. report flags high import duties, non-tariff barriers in India
content: The report also alleged that India's tariff rates are announced with the annual budget and are modified on an ad hoc basis through notifications in the Gazette without the opportunity for public comment

title: Free IPL tickets for Karnataka legislators likely to further narrow down tickets for fans
content: Interestingly, under existing ticketing norms, when a fan purchases tickets through official channels, a restriction limits each user to two tickets. In contrast, MLAs will now receive three “free tickets.”
